note: Small-batch external benchmark attempts. Blocked runs are not EGM quality scores.

tau_bench.error: LiteLLM/Anthropic 502 Bad Gateway before task scoring
tau_bench.root_cause: local Anthropic proxy accepts direct requests-style POSTs but returns 502 to the httpx/LiteLLM client stack used by tau-bench
tau_bench.interpretation: No tau-bench pass rate can be claimed from this run.

tau2_bench.error: DummyUser.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'tools'
tau2_bench.root_cause: minimal tau2 dummy_user path is broken in this setup; even before that, the local Anthropic proxy is not compatible with the httpx/LiteLLM client stack
tau2_bench.interpretation: No tau2 reward can be claimed from this run.

ragas_style.interpretation: Measured as a local RAGAS-style grounding/context-quality metric family, not an official leaderboard score.
